title: SoulForge
description: An UNDERTALE inspired mod for Fabric 1.21.1!
body:
# **_!!The mod is in the state of being reworked, this description is WIP and for the TRUE RESET update of the SoulForge mod!!_**
## A brief description
SoulForge is a Fabric and NeoForge mod currently for 1.21.1 that is inspired by UNDERTALE and DELTARUNE (by Toby Fox).
##  See that heart?
SoulForge is a magic mod centered around your soul, the very culmination of your being. Your soul starts off weak, but can grow stronger through lots of LOVE. LOVE is gained by completing special objectives along your journey (configurable through datapacks).

##  The Soul Forge
The cornerstone of your SoulForge journey will be the Soul Forge, a multiblock machine used for infusing soul essences that you will come across with different elements to create many magical objects and devices.
